title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at TCI Express - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at TCI Express - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the TCI Express family as a Distribution Manager in Ranchi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About TCI Express:
TCI Express is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TCI Express!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
